authors: Gregory P. Perreault The Zimmerman School
raw_title: Mitigating Hostility in Digital Journalism: Digital Hostility as Ossifier of Field Boundaries
title_en: Mitigating Hostility in Digital Journalism: Digital Hostility as Ossifier of Field Boundaries
title_zh: 缓解数字新闻中的敌意：数字敌意作为领域边界的固化者
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨数字新闻环境中如何减少敌意，认为数字敌意会固化新闻领域的边界。
plain_summary_en: This research explores how to reduce hostility in digital journalism, suggesting that digital hostility solidifies the boundaries of the journalism field.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字新闻中的敌意现象及其对新闻领域结构的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating hostility in digital journalism and its impact on the structure of the journalism field.
